features: Gentle exfoliation for ultra smooth, soft skin
Mango extract nourishes the skin whilst salt scrub removes dry & rough skin.
description: Product Description Energise your skin & mind with our  Mango Butter Body Scrub. Finely milled particles, infused with nourishing Mango Extract helps remove dead skin cells revealing a more even-toned complexion and smooth, soft skin. Ingredients Sea Salt, Glycerin, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Fruit Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Propylene Glycol, Parfum, Maltodextrin, Dipropylene Glycol, Hydrated Silica, CI 16255, CI 19140, Limonene. Directions Massage gently into wet skin, leave for 5 minutes and rinse well in the shower. Use 1-2 times a week. Safety Warning [16:49] Bobby Wagman For external use only. We recommend you test on a small area first to ensure there is no reaction. Do not apply to irritated, broken or sunburned skin. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Avoid contact with eyes. If this occurs rinse well with lukewarm water and seek medical advice if needed. Keep out of the reach of children. See more
